appraisal_events.evidence: « la seule parole ... capable de vaincre chez mes parents ce préjugé à l'égard de Bergotte... la situation changea de face »; Mère: « Cela me fait plaisir parce que c'est un homme de talent »; Père: « je ne nie en rien sa valeur littéraire devant laquelle tout le monde s'incline ».
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents the parents' swift reversal—triggered by Bergotte praising their son—as decisively overcoming their prior prejudice, locally elevating Bergotte in their eyes.

status_effects.explanation: He moves from being distrusted to being warmly acknowledged for his talent and accepted by the parents after his praise of their son.
